title: Goodbye, See You Tomorrow
writer: Zbigniew Cybulski, Bogumil Kobiela, Wilhelm Mach
actors: Zbigniew Cybulski, Teresa Tuszynska, Grazyna Muszynska
plot: Jacek is a handsome young Pole who belongs to a drama company. One day, in the streets of Gdansk, he meets Marguerite, a beautiful daughter of the French consul, and immediately falls for her.
